case_title: ROSAS, JUAN J. VS NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSAS, JUAN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO THE PLAINTIFF; HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF'S ACTUAL DAMAGES EXCEED THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT OF THIS COURT, SUCH THAT PLAINTIFF IS STILL ENTITLED TO RECOVERY IN THE SUM OF $$7,500. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S. HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROSAS, JUAN J. AS TO DEFENDANT NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S. ON OCT-24-2007 - GRANTED. $200 PER MONTH COMMENCING NOVEMBER 15, 2007; AND THEREAFTER ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED.
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSAS, JUAN J.
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT NAZARENO, ABRAHAM S.
